assertions.assertion: Shows AddUserAccessTokenHttpClient for the named HttpClient pattern with automatic token attachment
Shows GetUserAccessTokenAsync for the manual pattern
Both API endpoints use .AsBffApiEndpoint() for CSRF protection
Does NOT return the raw access token to the browser (no Results.Json with the token value)
assertions.rationale: Returns the remote service response, not the token. Explicitly warns against returning tokens.

assertions.assertion: Mentions that token refresh is handled automatically by AccessTokenManagement
assertions.rationale: Explains token refresh is handled transparently by Duende.AccessTokenManagement
